title: oxytropis deflexa var. foliolosa
intro: Oxytropis deflexa var. foliolosa, also known as the Himalayan knotted pea or alpine knapweed, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, native to the Himalayan region. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help to soothe respiratory issues and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Oxytropis deflexa var. foliolosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the leaves and stems for use in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
